source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A microwave circuit consisting of lossless transmission lines \( T_1 \) and \( T_2 \) is shown in the figure. The plot shows the magnitude of the input reflection coefficient \( \Gamma \) as a function of frequency \( f \). The phase velocity of the signal in the transmission lines is \( 2 \times 10^8 \, m/s \). The length \( L \) (in meters) of \( T_2 \) is ______.
extraction_notes: image field is a PIL image object representation, not an extractable path or URL
removed leading answer-format hint and kept the question body

image_dependency: 题干显式说明电路“shown in the figure”，且还需读取“plot shows the magnitude of the input reflection coefficient as a function of frequency”。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要来自图像而非文字。
需要从电路拓扑和反射系数曲线中提取信息，单靠题干文本不足以完成求解。
multi_step: 求解长度 L 需要先从图中识别反射系数随频率的特征或周期，再结合传输线物理关系进行换算。
题目同时涉及电路结构、频率响应图和给定相速度，属于图文联合推理而非单步读取。
答案为数值型且无选项，通常意味着需要连续计算而不是简单匹配。
verifiability: answer_type 为 numeric，标准答案给出为 0.1，目标输出形式清晰。
已给出相速度和唯一数值答案，后续可基于传输线公式与图中读数进行规则化核验。
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，题目、答案和图像资产登记完整。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产齐全，asset registry 无缺口且已通过登记校验。
初步打分显示图像依赖、高可验证性和较强多步推理价值，适合进入候选池。
虽然需要读图和读取反射系数曲线，但相关核心语义资产已经提供，不构成降级或拒绝理由。

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: A microwave circuit consisting of lossless transmission lines \(T_1\) and \(T_2\) is shown in the figure. The plot shows the magnitude of the input reflection coefficient \(|\Gamma|\) as a function of frequency \(f\). The phase velocity of the signal in the transmission lines is \(2 \times 10^8\,\text{m/s}\). The length \(L\) (in meters) of \(T_2\) is ______.
normalization_notes: Figure-dependent circuit topology and reflection-coefficient plot are required to interpret the problem.
force_requires_image=true, so the sample is routed to multimodal_full.
Normalized math formatting only; answer and choices preserved without semantic changes.
